_comment: Species: Corpse Yin Beast (尸阴兽) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Corpse Yin Beast

canonical.appearance: Undead beast 3 m, body is desiccated corpse-flesh, eyes glow with yin-fire
canonical.size: 3 m adult, 500 jin; ancient 10 m, 10000 jin
canonical.behavior: Undead predator; cultivates by absorbing yin-qi and corpse-essence
canonical.habitat: Corpse Yin Sect territory, yin-aspected caves, graveyards
canonical.relationships: Servant-beasts of Corpse Yin Sect; enemies of all living
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: corpse_yin_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
